User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing localized configuration preferences.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication user ID.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp representing the last configuration update.

OrderFeedback.title: OrderFeedback
OrderFeedback.description: Stores transaction feedback containing ratings and comments.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating feedback submission time.

users/{userId}.description: Locates user preferred configurations, queried by user auth context.

orders/{orderId}.description: Holds customer feedback rating data associated with an order identifier.
